data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for routing rules to queue/review/checkout based on lead quality or service type. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific information or endpoints that demonstrate the implementation of these routing rules. The linked use case mentions the need for such routing rules, but without concrete evidence of their existence or functionality, this requirement is deemed unmet.
gaps: No evidence of routing rules to queue/review/checkout based on lead quality or service type.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add routing rules validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the routing rules based on lead quality or service type.
